personalInfo.name: Deepak Mehta
personalInfo.university: Sagar Institute of Research & Technology, Bhopal

about.summary: Full Stack Developer with strong expertise in React.js, Redux Toolkit, and modern frontend architecture, along with hands-on experience in Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB.

experience.title: Frontend Developer
responsibilities: Built and optimized scalable frontend applications for User Website, Partner App, and Super Admin Panel using React.js, Redux Toolkit, and TailwindCSS.
Designed and implemented authentication, registration, and onboarding flows with role-based UI rendering.
Integrated REST APIs for cart, orders, payments, wallet, coupons, and cashback with optimized state management.
Implemented real-time order and rider tracking using WebSockets for live UI updates.
Integrated Razorpay payment gateway and improved performance via code splitting and reusable components.

experience.title: React Developer Intern
responsibilities: Built Doj User food delivery web app from scratch using React.js, Hooks, and TailwindCSS.
Integrated RESTful APIs using Axios for real-time data rendering.
Developed reusable UI components improving development speed by 30%.
Ensured pixel-perfect responsive UI and cross-browser compatibility.
Converted Figma designs into clean, reusable components.

projects.title: ShopSphere — Full Stack E-Commerce
projects.description: Built a scalable full-stack e-commerce platform with custom REST APIs, secure authentication using JWT & Bcrypt, and complete cart/order management system.

projects.title: GupShup — Real-Time Chat App
projects.description: Developed a real-time chat application with sub-100ms message delivery using WebSockets and scalable backend architecture.

projects.title: Yum Xpress
projects.description: Desktop-based food delivery system built with Java Swing, JDBC, and Oracle DB with order and inventory management.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Modern responsive portfolio with animations, dark mode, and optimized UI showcasing projects and skills.

projects.title: Netflix Clone
projects.description: Frontend clone of Netflix homepage focusing on layout, responsiveness, and UI design.
